prompt: Using the provided reference image as the stylistic base, transform it into a new surreal Salvador Dalí-inspired coastal dreamscape rather than copying the melting-clock composition. Keep the same oil-painting feel, warm desert-seaside horizon, long shadows, and uncanny realism, but replace the original clock scene with an ornate architectural still-life arrangement: a tall eroded stone facade with multiple circular openings on the left, classical urns and small decorative figures on top, a distant garden/temple view framed through one opening, a draped white cloth at the base, and a large chalice-like reflective basin on the right containing a tiny island. Add a floating cracked egg/parachute form with dangling strings in the sky, a small suspended sphere, a rocky coastline in the distance, and a small pedestal with an egg and dark draped cloth in the lower right. Include exactly 2 flat opaque rectangular mask blocks over the image: 1 large vertical olive-gray rectangle covering the central structure and 1 smaller olive-gray rectangle near the upper-right floating object. Maintain a muted antique palette, precise surrealist lighting, and painterly canvas texture; avoid modern objects, text, or photorealistic digital effects.
